title: chaenorhinum minus subsp. litorale
intro: Chaenorhinum minus subsp. litorale, commonly known as sea snapdragon, is a plant species belonging to the family Scrophulariaceae. It is known for its medicinal properties, particularly its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects, which make it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Chaenorhinum minus subsp. litorale include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve respiratory issues, and support the immune system. Traditionally, the plant is used to prepare herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health issues.
